tracks.meaning: the main central axis of a plant, typically green and herbaceous, that bears leaves, flowers, and fruit
the main trunk or central part of a blood vessel or nerve from which smaller branches arise
to stop, restrain, or check the progress or flow of something
to move or travel in a particular direction or course
to originate from or be derived from a particular source or ancestry
a core programming structure or module from which other components are built
to reduce the number of employees or cut back on organizational operations
the central woody core of a piece of fruit such as an apple or pear
a cell from which other cells develop or differentiate
to trace something back to its origin or source in legal proceedings
